topics.label: Weekend & Great & Went
topics.summary: Hi! How was your weekend? It was great! I went hiking on Sunday. I usually do that every weekend. That sounds fun! Where do you hike? I often go to the local trails near my place. It's really peaceful.

topics.label: Thinking & Camping & Haven
topics.summary: By the way, I've been thinking about camping. I haven't camped in years.

topics.label: Should & Try & Anyway
topics.summary: You should try it! Anyway, how's work been?

topics.label: Work & Pretty & Stressful
topics.summary: Work has been pretty stressful lately. I've been working late almost every day.

topics.label: Sounds & Exhausting & Heavy
topics.summary: Oh no, that sounds exhausting. Do you have a heavy project?

topics.label: Yeah & Launching & Product
topics.summary: Yeah, we're launching a new product. I'm an engineer on the team.

topics.label: Exciting & Tell & More
topics.summary: That's exciting! Tell me more about it.

topics.label: Well & Work & Senior
topics.summary: Well, I work as a senior software engineer. The project involves AI and machine learning.

topics.label: Wow & Interested
topics.summary: Wow! Are you interested in AI?

topics.label: Absolutely & Love & Read
topics.summary: Absolutely! I love AI. I read about it constantly. I'm actually from San Francisco originally.

topics.label: Tech & Hub & Live
topics.summary: That's a tech hub! Do you live there now?

topics.label: Live & San & Francisco
topics.summary: I do! I live in San Francisco. I'm 28 years old. My name is Alex.

topics.label: Nice & Meet & Alex
topics.summary: Nice to meet you, Alex! Any hobbies besides hiking and work?

topics.label: Coffee & Love & Always
topics.summary: I love coffee! I always have coffee in the morning. Can't start the day without it.

topics.label: Same & Here & Favorite
topics.summary: Same here! What's your favorite coffee?

topics.label: Usually & Prefer & Dark
topics.summary: I usually prefer dark roast. I often go to this local café near my office.
